channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Another tag., 3rd April
item.description:
Is cctv checked to find these people?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposted political leaflet, 3rd April
item.description:
Outside mosque advertising local election candidates

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in space beside entrance to hainthorpe estate, 3rd April
item.description:
Increased flytipping in the space beside the entrance to hainthorpe estate off Canterbury Close. A fence has blown down and more flytipping is occurring here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yeoman Close, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More Trees please :), 3rd April
item.description:
Hi there, I was wondering if its possible us for too have more tress planted back on Brightling Road. I remember many a years ago our street use to be greener, but over the years, pavements have been repaired and old trees have been lost and paved over. Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brightling Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside of 28 Peckham Rye, 3rd April
item.description:
Near Peckham rye bus stop includes rubbish bags and broken furniture

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Rye, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated bollard on zebra crossing missing, 3rd April
item.description:
Illuminated bollard on zebra crossing is damaged and missing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thurlow Park Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poorly repaired pavement outside elderly ladies house, 3rd April
item.description:
Good afternoon, the pavement was repaired but unfortunately it has been repaired extremely badly. It sits directly outside an elderly ladies house and it is dangerous and a fall hazard each time she leaves her house. Please could a larger section of the pavement be replaced and levelled out, not only for our neighbour but also the community, many people are tripping on this also our street is used heavily during school runs. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brightling Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree destroyed by building company., 3rd April
item.description:
Good afternoon, we use to have a lovely tree here, it really brighten up our street. The tree was damaged during building work outside no.22 from a large van and the tree near recovered. it was be wonderful if we could get another tree planted. many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brightling Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress left inside a building from previous tenant, 3rd April
item.description:
Hi there This were left in the building from previous tenants, organise a collection to get those removed from here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Princess May Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shutters need cleaning, 3rd April
item.description:
Horrid tagging on pharmacy front. Please clean through the free Southwark service. Owner shuts up, goes home and doesn’t have to put up with it. Not acceptable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 245, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmington Road, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping, 3rd April

item.title: Lots of potholes & drain cover falling apart, 3rd April
item.description:
Lots of potholes & drain cover falling apart been here ages in exit & entry to car park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Loxley Close, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover misaligned and sticking up in the road, 3rd April
item.description:
There is a drain cover sticking up in the road, just before the bus stop southbound on the A406, just past the railway bridge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Circular Road, Colney Hatch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grey Scott speedster bike frame, 3rd April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Bride Street, Barnsbury, Greater London

item.title: Fly - tipping, 3rd April
item.description:
Old Mattress and carpets at 113-123 Victorian Grove, Stoke Newington.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car, 3rd April
item.description:
The car has a flat tyre and has not moved in over two months on Heavitree Road. No owner seems to have returned to the car as it has remained in the same space since the beginning of the year.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heavitree Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
